description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden cabin with a dark brown, multi-gabled roof and a prominent covered carport attached to one side. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal timber logs, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. The cabin features several windows of varying sizes, mostly rectangular, arranged asymmetrically across the visible facades. A covered porch area is present, providing sheltered outdoor space, and the structure sits on a rectangular grassy plot. The roof has deep overhangs and exposed rafters, typical of craftsman or lodge-style cabins. The overall design suggests a comfortable residential dwelling suitable for suburban or semi-rural neighborhoods.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a dark gabled roof, attached carport, and asymmetrical window arrangement, set on a grassy plot. Features a covered porch and exposed timber details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and attached carport with two visible parked vehicles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long expanse of the roof, side windows, and the carport extending from the main structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area, additional windows, and the full width of the cabin's rear facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the cabin, side porch, and the carport's roof structure.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs and exposed rafters, covered in dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows of varying sizes, arranged asymmetrically across the front, sides, and rear; some grouped in pairs, others standalone, with no clear symmetry
attribute_door_placement: One main entrance door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, and a large garage door on the left side under the carport
